agenitc_sdk.html.description: See how agent frameworks like LangGraph, CrewAI, and Google A2A work cleanly at Layer 7, yet fail on legacy networks that force API gateways and open firewall ports, and how Cynapsa provides the zero-trust tunnel instead.
agenitc_sdk.html.title: Agentic SDKs Assume Connectivity

llm_and_ai_security.html.description: This demo contrasts a legacy AI networking setup that opens a firewall port and leaves the server exposed, with Rave Tech’s zero-trust Layer 3/4 mesh that keeps firewalls closed while Layer 7 tools inspect the AI payload safely.
llm_and_ai_security.html.title: Securing the Pipes vs. the Water

observibility.html.description: See how Rave Tech addresses the legacy failure of code-injected logging by providing visibility across owned, third-party, and unmanaged agents with zero code changes and mesh-delivered telemetry.
observibility.html.title: Visibility and Control
